item.title: Quilt 1.5: Speed, Stability, and Smarter Captures
item.description:
Quilt 1.5: Speed, Stability, and Smarter Captures

Version 1.5 is a massive under-the-hood upgrade focused on performance and reliability. We've rewritten core parts of the app to be faster, more precise, and significantly more efficient with your Mac's resources, all while introducing powerful new capture logic.

✨ New Features

  • All-New Scrolling Capture Engine 📜: Scrolling capture has been re-engineered from the ground up for speed and precision.
    • Live Stitching: Your scrolling captures are now built in real-time using Apple's Vision framework for incredible accuracy. No more waiting for post-processing!
    • Smart Stop: The capture automatically ends when it detects the content is no longer scrolling, saving you time.
  • Robust Display Handling 💻: Quilt now intelligently handles changes to your monitor setup. If a display is disconnected mid-capture, the session will pause and let you choose a new target, preventing failed captures.

🚀 Improvements & Fixes

  • Massive Performance Boost 🚀: Enjoy significantly reduced CPU usage and better memory management, especially during captures and in the preview window. The app is now faster and lighter than ever.
  • Optimized Previews & Exports: The preview grid loads thumbnails much faster, and exporting large batches of images or PDFs is now multi-threaded and dramatically quicker.
  • Proper Display Names: The source picker now shows the actual names of your monitors (e.g., "Studio Display") instead of just their resolutions.
  • Smarter File Naming: Exports will now automatically get a numbered suffix (e.g., capture-1.png) to prevent accidentally overwriting existing files.
  • Fixed: The "Press Esc to Stop" overlay will no longer appear in your final screenshots.
